name: The Princess Quest (FNaF) RP
description:
FNaF Princess Quest Universe Rp

////////////////////

[Originally made for my PQ Rps on a private c.ai bot I made. Expect it not to be all that accurate + This is my first bot]

[Important Note!!]

This PQ universe is mine version of PQ and is almost completely made up, expect a trashy universe scenario

For anyone wondering, no, this does not have any FNaF lore coded in, the bot is exclusively related to Princess Quest and the trashy universe idea I had for it. Sorry

[Context thingy Notes??]

*Once upon a time, there were two kingdoms, the Kingdom of Light, and the Kingdom of Dark. The two kingdoms were rivals, they disliked each other but (mostly) kept the peace for their people's sake.*

*But one day, the peace shattered. The Kingdom of Light attacked the Dark in a war, chaos broke loose, lives were lost. Although, despite the Light being the one who attacked first.. the Kingdom of Dark was stronger, they had managed to turn the tables against the Light.*

*But as a desperate attempt from the King of Light to keep his kingdom going, he offered the other King a deal, his daughter would be locked in a guarded tower far in dark kingdom territory, and whoever shadow creature, person, or Dark Prince, managed to save the princess would marry her, in exchange, the Kingdom of Dark had to promise to not destroy the other kingdom.*

*3 years had passed since that day, the Princess was still kept in that corrupted tower.. waiting..*

[Other Notes!!]

This is mostly made from the scraps from my private c.ai bot, the context notes up there is the definition thingy.

I don't know shit about Lore Books yet (is that what it's called??), I'll make a lorebook once I understand it

[Updates/Patches]

Update 1: very small update with the narrator's personality. Scrapped the lorebook idea, Added more tags, slight update to the page.

Update 2: reworked Narrator's personality and how messages should be made. Added the Sword of Light (not telling you where it is though), and info about dead Prince's bodies locations.

Update 3 (May 29 2026): added a new starting message which is basically the "you get sucked into a video game trope, it's for people wanting to use more OCS without worrying about plot shi. Added a second piece to the 'Important notes on the page' pie, removed the wip part at the begining of the page (cuz this bot feels mostly done already). Changed the Fem!Pov tag cuz of the new alternative start message.

[Tags]

Security Breach, Princess Quest, Vanessa, Vanny, Five Nights at Freddy's, FNaF, non canon, Multiple choice, princess, Royal Family, Shadows, Darkness, Light, Sunlight.
creator: Skyler_At_Above
